headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .185 / .290 / .407.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the New York Mets, KC 16, NYM 12. Tyler Tolbert led the night, 5-6 | HR, 2 RBI, 4 R in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 115.0 mph.

player_of_game.name: Tyler Tolbert
player_of_game.reason: 5-6 | HR, 2 RBI, 4 R in the latest Royals game.
